prose:
Frontier-orbital calculation on formaldehyde (H₂C=O) using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (chemkit tier 'standard') in PySCF. Gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1 (closed-shell RKS). Exact four-centre integrals (density fitting NOT enabled). Geometry: user-supplied .xyz, used as-is (single-point; geometry not re-optimized at this level). SCF converged in 8 cycles. No warnings reported. Integrity check: status=ok, trustworthy=true.

Key results:
  HOMO energy:        −7.6523067 eV  (orbital index 7)
  LUMO energy:        −1.7826355 eV  (orbital index 8)
  HOMO–LUMO gap:       5.8696712 eV  ← headline value
  Total energy:     −114.55325 Hartree / −3117.1528 eV / −71883.251 kcal mol⁻¹

Koopmans-theorem descriptors:
  Vertical IP  = 7.6523067 eV
  Vertical EA  = 1.7826355 eV
  Electronegativity χ = 4.7174711 eV
  Chemical hardness η = 2.9348356 eV
  Chemical softness S = 0.34073459 eV⁻¹
  Electrophilicity ω  = 3.7914447 eV

CLI: /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/formaldehyde/formaldehyde.xyz --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1
Output JSON: formaldehyde_frontier_dft.json
